title: DfI Driver, Vehicle, Operator & Enforcement Statistics-2025-26-Q2
body: "This is a quarterly release of information on the testing, licensing and enforcement / compliance activities of the Driver and Vehicle Agency in Northern Ireland. The statistics reported within this publication include summary key business volumes and transactions for drivers, vehicles, operators and in the area of regulation and enforcement during the second quarter of 2025-26 (i.e. July 2025 to September 2025). "

taxons.title: Lorry, bus, coach and specialist vehicle driving tests
Car, motorcycle and van MOT tests
HGV, bus and trailer MOT tests
